title: North America Clean Fuels Market Monthly Review: September 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

BC LCFS monthly trading volumes rose from 104.15 K credits in July to 266.87 K credits in August. In August, BC LCFS credit prices declined by 9.06% MoM. In August, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 8.92% compared to July.OR CFP trading activity witnessed a 34.5% fall in August. CA LCFS average monthly credit price for Type 1 trades fell by 3.83% month-over-month (MoM) in September. Monthly credit transactions increased by 35.22% MoM in September. Canada CFR bid and offer prices for CC2 & CC3 rose MoM in September. The average CC3 offer price rose by 6.13% whereas for CC2, the average offer price for CC2 credits rose by 6.14%.CC2 and CC3 average bid prices stand at 325.21 CAD & average offer prices stand at 338.26 CAD in September. Average credit prices in WA CFS fell by 1.03% MoM in August. In August, 120.94 K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $3.03 M. RIN generation decreased by 12.11% MoM in August. 3.04B RINs transacted in the month of August, recording nearly a 34.92% MoM fall.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
